stemHtml: Which of the following is the best definition of episodic memory? It is the memory of events that are held in the..

options.a: short term memory and can be influenced by suggestion.
options.b: long term memory and can be influenced by the meaning of words and language.
options.c: short term memory and can be influenced by the meaning of words and language.
options.d: long term memory and can be influenced by suggestion.
